rules: Use 總控專案 relation as the source of truth for task-to-project linkage.
Keep legacy project select fields only while scripts and views migrate.
Project body content must preserve process evidence, not only conclusions.
Do not copy records, messages, attachments, or secrets between HOZO AM and 7AM.
